💰 Host
TRUSTPAD-ETHER
🏃‍♂ Rule
Strictly for eligible active wallets (new wallets or empty wallets are excluded). Wallets from exchanges are not eligible. Each person is limited to join once.

Nanoledger COIN

$Nanoledger is the native platform coin for the Nanoledger platform. $Nanoledger acts as a nexus of web3 games and gamers, providing game distribution and player simplicity for all.

USE WITHIN GAMES

Use $Nanoledger in games to buy & sell game items

GOVERNANCE

Vote and influence the future direction of $Nanoledger coin and platform

PLATFORM UTILITY

Use $Nanoledger in marketplaces such as MagicEden + more

NODE PURCHASES

Purchase Nodes to power the core Nanoledger infrastructure and platform

Token

  • Token:
    Nanoledger
  • Type:
    ERC20
  • Eligibility:
    You must have an active non-custodial wallet to be eligible.
  • Event time:
    Until the pool is empty

Distribution

  • Distribution
    Claimed via Airdrop
    • Participants/Citizens from the following countries are strictly excluded/not allowed to participate in the IDOs: Bolivia, Cambodia, Iran, Iraq, Libya, Nepal, Zimbabwe, Liberia, Myanmar, North Korea.
